title: Find My Device - Play/Stop - multiple tries and exits
scenario: Repeatedly pressing Play/Stop on Find My Device tone causes app to exit or require multiple attempts to function correctly
steps: Open the Find My Device app
Tap the Play button to start the tone
Tap the Stop button to stop the tone
Repeat steps 3 and 4 multiple times in succession
expected: The app should remain open and responsive, and the tone should start/stop correctly with each Play/Stop action.
